film.title: Searching for Bobby Fischer
film.overview: A seven-year-old chess prodigy refuses to harden himself in order to become a champion like the famous but unlikable Bobby Fischer.

dialogues.dialogue: He goes to school?  Oh, no.  Well, that's great. You should be proud of yourself.  I am.  You should watch him play. He reminds me of you,

has in the eyes of his teacher... attained the rank of Grandmaster."  attained the rank of Grandmaster."  I have never been so proud of anyone in my life.  I'm honored to call myself your teacher.  I'm so scared.

dialogues.dialogue: All right! All right!  My man!  I'm so proud of you. I knew you could do it.  I told you. I told you.  Bobby Fischer played in Washington Square Park, too.
